features: Gold Number Balloons 40:Includes 2 pcs * 40 inches (101 cm) self-inflating gold number balloons(number 0 + number 4), 6pcs 12inch gold confetti balloons,a 10m ribbon, extra large enough to decorate your family and friends' birthday parties, It is the choice for your birthday party balloon decoration

Durable Quality Material:This giant 40" mylar number balloons are made of durable-quality aluminum foil, the confetti balloons are made of latex, all the balloons are ,durable, strong and light. Just filling 90% of the balloon that could allow the balloon to expand completely

Easy to assemble & deflate:It supports helium or air, after filling, the valve of the aluminum foil balloon is automatically closed, it is recommended to pinch the self-sealing valve to prevent air leakage. these number balloons have holes at the top and can be stringed or hung with ribbon; Also be attached to walls, windows or doors

Wide application:The shiny number 40 mylar foil Balloons with pack of 6 confetti latex balloons is ideal for girls women 40th birthday party balloons, as a backdrop or photo props, pool party, men and women 40th anniversary event wedding party, baby shower party, engagement ceremony, graduation party decorations supplies

Digital 40 Balloons: Your 40th birthday party decorations will be much more decent and vivid by hanging the 40 number balloons. Very nice gloss with bright color and big size for 40th birthday party decors. You will be very satisfied
